meaning: n.政府官员举行的记者招待会
examples: But first, a basic backgrounder on grid computing and peer-to-peer functionality.
But on the question of the Ethiopians being in Somalia, give us the backgrounder on that.
Only Franz Kafka could do a write-up of this suit justice, but the SCOTUSblog has a nice backgrounder.
In addition, Dr Matthews gave the students a backgrounder on the work of the National Commission before award ceremony at Government House.
